message:
🌱 vault: AWS backend stsAssume with "External ID" (#1118)

* 🌱 Add vault: AWS backend stsAssume with "External ID" mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🐛 Fix vault-3790 mission: update PR link from closed #5033 to merged #26628

PR #5033 was closed/not merged. The actual implementation was PR #26628
(merged May 2024) which added ExternalID support for AWS Auth STS config.
Updated PR URL, step 3 description, and resolution summary.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+{

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vault: AWS backend stsAssume with \"External ID\"",
+    "description": "AWS backend stsAssume with \"External ID\". Requested by 13+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current vault setup",
+        "description": "Verify your vault version and configuration:\n```bash\nvault version\n```\nThis feature requires a working vault installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review vault configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant vault configuration:\n**Feature Request:**\nSecurity improvement for AWS backend \"External ID\" parameter for stsAssume operation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for AWS backend stsAssume with \"External ID\"",
+        "description": "Vault added ExternalID support for AWS Auth STS configuration in PR #26628 (merged May 2024). This allows specifying an external_id when configuring AWS STS assume role operations, addressing the Confused Deputy security concern.\n```bash\n# Configure AWS auth with external_id for STS assume role\nvault write auth/aws/config/client \\\n  sts_endpoint=\"https://sts.amazonaws.com\" \\\n  external_id=\"your-external-id\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"AWS backend stsAssume with \"External ID\"\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Vault added ExternalID support for AWS Auth STS configuration in PR #26628 (merged May 2024). This addresses the Confused Deputy security concern by allowing an external_id parameter when calling sts:AssumeRole, which is especially important when assuming roles in foreign AWS accounts.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
